pages.text: This field guide was compiled from recovered research notes and firsthand experience with the nanotech.$(br2)It covers the materials left by the asteroid impact, how to process them, and how to harness the technology they contain.$(br2)Read carefully. The knowledge here may save your life.

$(bold)A note on safety:$()$(br)Nano Alloy fragments are safe to handle with bare hands. However, prolonged direct contact with raw ore may cause mild disorientation in individuals who have undergone nanobot integration.$(br2)Life Essence, once extracted, must be stored carefully — it degrades when exposed to direct sunlight for extended periods.
